title: prunus × blireana
intro: Prunus × blireana is a deciduous shrub or small tree known for its fragrant flowers and edible fruit, which is a hybrid of Prunus avium and Prunus incana. The medicinal properties of Prunus × blireana are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of consuming Prunus × blireana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Prunus × blireana can be prepared as herbal tea, jam, or dried fruit, and is also used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and immunity.
